mapper.sql: COMPARISON_ID, COMPARISON_NAME, DESCRIPTION, SYBASE_QUERY, ORACLE_QUERY, COMPARE_MODE, ENABLED_YN, SCHEDULE_ENABLED_YN, CRON_EXPRESSION, NOTIFY_ENABLED_YN, NOTIFY_ON_SUCCESS_YN, NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS, AI_SQL_REVIEW_YN, AI_ANALYSIS_ENABLED_YN, AI_SQL_REVIEW_STATUS, AI_SQL_REVIEW_SUMMARY, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_AT
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM BM_QUERY_COMPARISON WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY UPDATED_AT DESC, COMPARISON_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT BM_QUERY_COMPARISON_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BM_QUERY_COMPARISON ( COMPARISON_ID, COMPARISON_NAME, DESCRIPTION, SYBASE_QUERY, ORACLE_QUERY, COMPARE_MODE, ENABLED_YN, SCHEDULE_ENABLED_YN, CRON_EXPRESSION, NOTIFY_ENABLED_YN, NOTIFY_ON_SUCCESS_YN, NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS, AI_SQL_REVIEW_YN, AI_ANALYSIS_ENABLED_YN, AI_SQL_REVIEW_STATUS, AI_SQL_REVIEW_SUMMARY, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{comparisonId}, #{comparisonName}, #{description}, #{sybaseQuery}, #{oracleQuery}, #{compareMode}, #{enabledYn}, #{scheduleEnabledYn}, #{cronExpression}, #{notifyEnabledYn}, #{notifyOnSuccessYn}, #{notifyRecipients}, #{aiSqlReviewYn}, #{aiAnalysisEnabledYn}, #{aiSqlReviewStatus}, #{aiSqlReviewSummary}, #{createdBy}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{updatedBy}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE BM_QUERY_COMPARISON SET COMPARISON_NAME = #{comparisonName}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, SYBASE_QUERY = #{sybaseQuery}, ORACLE_QUERY = #{oracleQuery}, COMPARE_MODE = #{compareMode}, ENABLED_YN = #{enabledYn}, SCHEDULE_ENABLED_YN = #{scheduleEnabledYn}, CRON_EXPRESSION = #{cronExpression}, NOTIFY_ENABLED_YN = #{notifyEnabledYn}, NOTIFY_ON_SUCCESS_YN = #{notifyOnSuccessYn}, NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS = #{notifyRecipients}, AI_SQL_REVIEW_YN = #{aiSqlReviewYn}, AI_ANALYSIS_ENABLED_YN = #{aiAnalysisEnabledYn}, AI_SQL_REVIEW_STATUS = #{aiSqlReviewStatus}, AI_SQL_REVIEW_SUMMARY = #{aiSqlReviewSummary}, UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE COMPARISON_ID = #{comparisonId}
UPDATE BM_QUERY_COMPARISON SET ENABLED_YN = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE COMPARISON_ID = #{comparisonId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT BM_QUERY_COMPARE_RESULT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BM_QUERY_COMPARISON_RESULT ( RESULT_ID, COMPARISON_ID, REQUESTED_BY, REQUESTED_AT, STARTED_AT, FINISHED_AT, RESULT_STATUS, SYBASE_ROW_COUNT, ORACLE_ROW_COUNT, SYBASE_RESULT_HASH, ORACLE_RESULT_HASH, MISMATCH_SUMMARY, ERROR_MESSAGE, ORACLE_BATCH_CONTEXT, AI_ANALYSIS_STATUS, AI_ANALYSIS, AI_ACTION_GUIDE ) VALUES ( #{resultId}, #{comparisonId}, #{requestedBy}, #{requestedAt}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{resultStatus}, #{sybaseRowCount}, #{oracleRowCount}, #{sybaseResultHash}, #{oracleResultHash}, #{mismatchSummary}, #{errorMessage}, #{oracleBatchContext}, #{aiAnalysisStatus}, #{aiAnalysis}, #{aiActionGuide} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.RESULT_ID, r.COMPARISON_ID, c.COMPARISON_NAME, r.REQUESTED_BY, r.REQUESTED_AT, r.STARTED_AT, r.FINISHED_AT, r.RESULT_STATUS, r.SYBASE_ROW_COUNT, r.ORACLE_ROW_COUNT, r.SYBASE_RESULT_HASH, r.ORACLE_RESULT_HASH, r.MISMATCH_SUMMARY, r.ERROR_MESSAGE, r.ORACLE_BATCH_CONTEXT, r.AI_ANALYSIS_STATUS, r.AI_ANALYSIS, r.AI_ACTION_GUIDE FROM BM_QUERY_COMPARISON_RESULT r JOIN BM_QUERY_COMPARISON c ON r.COMPARISON_ID = c.COMPARISON_ID WHERE r.RESULT_ID = #{resultId}

SELECT r.RESULT_ID, r.COMPARISON_ID, c.COMPARISON_NAME, r.REQUESTED_BY, r.REQUESTED_AT, r.STARTED_AT, r.FINISHED_AT, r.RESULT_STATUS, r.SYBASE_ROW_COUNT, r.ORACLE_ROW_COUNT, r.SYBASE_RESULT_HASH, r.ORACLE_RESULT_HASH, r.MISMATCH_SUMMARY, r.ERROR_MESSAGE, r.ORACLE_BATCH_CONTEXT, r.AI_ANALYSIS_STATUS, r.AI_ANALYSIS, r.AI_ACTION_GUIDE FROM BM_QUERY_COMPARISON_RESULT r JOIN BM_QUERY_COMPARISON c ON r.COMPARISON_ID = c.COMPARISON_ID WHERE r.COMPARISON_ID = #{comparisonId} ORDER BY r.REQUESTED_AT DESC, r.RESULT_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
FROM BM_QUERY_COMPARISON WHERE ENABLED_YN = 'Y' AND SCHEDULE_ENABLED_YN = 'Y' AND CRON_EXPRESSION IS NOT NULL ORDER BY COMPARISON_ID ASC

SELECT r.RESULT_ID, r.COMPARISON_ID, c.COMPARISON_NAME, r.REQUESTED_BY, r.REQUESTED_AT, r.STARTED_AT, r.FINISHED_AT, r.RESULT_STATUS, r.SYBASE_ROW_COUNT, r.ORACLE_ROW_COUNT, r.SYBASE_RESULT_HASH, r.ORACLE_RESULT_HASH, r.MISMATCH_SUMMARY, r.ERROR_MESSAGE, r.ORACLE_BATCH_CONTEXT, r.AI_ANALYSIS_STATUS, r.AI_ANALYSIS, r.AI_ACTION_GUIDE FROM BM_QUERY_COMPARISON_RESULT r JOIN BM_QUERY_COMPARISON c ON r.COMPARISON_ID = c.COMPARISON_ID WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY r.REQUESTED_AT DESC, r.RESULT_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BM_QUERY_COMPARISON_RESULT r JOIN BM_QUERY_COMPARISON c ON r.COMPARISON_ID = c.COMPARISON_ID WHERE 1 = 1
